examples: She was then hooked up to an IV drip.
She was muzzled with an oxygen mask and tethered to an IV.
It's Downey, who drugs Self via his IV and holds him down as he begins to twitch.
The Nash Conservatory was relocated from Buckingham Palace grounds in 1836 by reigning British monarch King William IV.
And experts often disagree on which IV fluids are best, leading to wide variation in practice.
